body.head: Iḷampūraṇar
body.p: ed. Namaccivāya Mutaliyār 1931, 175.
varalāṟu:
eṉpatu, yāṉaiyaiyum tēraiyum āḷaiyum eṟintār eṉṟavāṟu; ummaiyeṇṇiṉkaṇ uruputokkavā ṟāyiṟṟu. (43)

body.head: Cēṉāvaraiyar
body.p: ed. Ci. Vai. Tāmōtarampiḷḷai 1868, 223–224.
i – ḷ. ummaiyeṇṇiṉkaṇ urupu tokutal varaiyappaṭātu. e-ṟu.
u – m.

eṉṉum potuvitiyāṉ ummaiyeṇṇiṉkaṇ urupu tokal peṟappaṭṭamaiyāl, peṟṟataṉpeyartturai niyamapporuṭṭākalāṉ, ummaiyeṇṇiṉurupu tokal varaiyappaṭātu; ēṉaiyeṇṇiṉkaṇ avai varaiyappaṭumeṉa niyamittal itaṟkup payaṉākak koḷka.
eṉap piṟaveṇṇiṉkaṇ urupu tokkatāleṉiṉ; ― aṟṟaṉṟu: cevveṇ tokaiyiṉṟi nillāmaiyiṉ avaṟṟaiyeṉa orucol virikkappaṭum; virikkavē, kuṉṟi mutalāyiṉa eḻuvāyāy niṉṟaṉavāmeṉpatu.
u - m.
eṉa ummaiyeṇṇiṉkaṇ urupu tokkavāṟu kaṇṭukoḷka.
varaiyāreṉṟataṉāṉ, āṇṭum ellāvurupuntokā; aiyuṅkaṇṇumē tokuvaṉaveṉak koḷka.

yāṉai tēr kutirai kālāḷeṟintār eṉa ummaiyum urupum uṭaṉṟokkavaḻi ummaittokaiyeṉṉātu uruputokaiyeṉkaveṉpatu iccūttirattiṟkuk karuttāka uraittārāl uraiyāciriyareṉiṉ; ― aḵtu ummaittokaiyātaliṉ orucoṉṉaṭaittāy urupēṟṟāṉum payaṉilai koṇṭāṉum niṟkum. attokaiyiṭai urupiṉmai ciṟṟaṟiviṉārkkum pulaṉām; ataṉāṉ aḵtavarkkuk karuttaṉmai collavēṇṭumōveṉpatu. (43)

body.head: Nacciṉārkkiṉiyar
body.p: ed. Irāma. Kōvintacāmipiḷḷai 1997, 316―318.
ummai yeṇṇil urupu tokutal
iḵtummaiyu murupun tokka vaḻiyum uruputokaiyeṉappaṭumeṉa vaḻuvamaittavāṟu.
(i-ḷ) ummai eṇṇiṉ ― ummaiyāṉ varumeṇṇiṉ kaṇ, urupu tokal varaiyār ― iraṇṭāvatu mēḻāvatun tokku niṟṟalai nīkkā rāciriyareṉṟavāṟu.
ummaiyeṇṇeṉap potuppaṭak kūṟutaliṉ ummai tokkuḻiyum virintuḻiyu murupu tokuttal koḷka.
(u-m)
eṉṉum palapeya rummait tokaikaḷ orucoṉṉaṭai yavāyk ‘kiṭantaṉa, vantaṉa’ eṉṉun tamviṉaiyākiya payaṉilaikaḷaik koḷḷum vaḻiyum,
eṉavummai virintu niṉṟa poruḷait tantē niṟkumāṟu pōla, ivvummait tokaikaḷ,
eṉa vurupēṟṟu niṉṟavaḻiyum,

eṉa vummai virintu niṉṟa poruḷain tattē niṟṟal vēṇṭum. aṅkaṉa mummai virintu niṟkumiṭattu vaittāṉeṉṉum viṉaimutal viṉaikkup puliyum villuṅ keṇṭaiyuñ ceyappaṭu poruḷā yiraṇṭā murupē virittu niṟṟalum eṟintā ṉeṉṉum viṉaimutal viṉaikku yāṉai mutaliyaṉa ceyappaṭu poruḷā yiraṇṭā murupē virittu niṟṟalu muṇarka.

eṉṉum palapeyar ummait tokaikkum ummaiyu murupum virittē poruḷuraikka. ik kuṉṟi mutaliyavaṟṟaic cevveṇākki ‘yivaṟṟai’yeṉat tokai koṭutturupu virittuḻiyum accuṭṭu akkuṉṟi mutaliyavaṟṟaiyē cuṭṭutaliṉ akkuṉṟi mutaliyaṉa ceyappaṭu poruḷāyē niṟkumāṟu muṇarka. aṉṟiyavai cevveṇṇāyiṉ.

eṉṟāṟ pōla vummaiyu murupum virittaṟkup poruntātu eḻuvāyāy nāṉkeṉṉun tokaiccoṟ payaṉilai koṇṭu niṟṟal vēṇṭu meṉṟuṇarka. ivai yummait tokaikka ṇurupu tokkaṉa. iṅṅaṉa miraṇṭu tokkaṉavaṟṟai yeṉṉa tokai yeṉṟu kōṭumō veṉiṉ puliyaiyum villaiyuṅ keṇṭaiyaiyum vaittāṉeṉa virittuḻi yeṇṇupporuṭantu niṟku mummaiyiṉuñ coṟṟoṭarpporuḷai yuṇartti niṟpa turupātali ṉacciṟappu nōkki yurupu tokaiyeṉṟē kōṭum.
iṉip
eṉṉum ivai yummai virintu niṉṟurupu tokkaṉa. (43)

body.head: Teyvaccilaiyār
body.p: eṇṇummaikku uriyatōr vēṟupāṭu uṇarttutal nutaliṟṟu.
i-ḷ: ― ummaiyāṉ eṇṇappaṭṭa poruḷiṉkaṇ varum urupākiya ummai ōriṭattut tokutalum nīkkār. e-ṟu.
eṉavē, coṟṟoṟum ummai koṭākkālum ummai eṇṇākum eṉṟavāṟām.
u-m:―
eṉa ummai orōvaḻit tokku niṉṟatu. ivvilakkaṇam eṇṇummaikkē yurittu. [42]
